events.event_description: Ralph James Totten presented credentials as Minister Resident/Consul General to the Union of South Africa, establishing the first U.S. diplomatic mission.

evidence.quote: Ralph James Totten, Minister Resident/Consul General. Appointed: 1929-12-19. Credentials presented: 1930-02-18. Promoted to Envoy Extraordinary and Minister Plenipotentiary 1930-09-08. Note: Commissioned to the Union of South Africa.

events.event_description: Totten promoted to Envoy Extraordinary and Minister Plenipotentiary, elevating the U.S. mission in South Africa to a full Legation headed by an Envoy.

evidence.quote: Promoted to Envoy Extraordinary and Minister Plenipotentiary 1930-09-08. Note: Commissioned to the Union of South Africa.

events.event_description: North Winship promoted to Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary, elevating the U.S. Legation in South Africa to an Embassy.

evidence.quote: North Winship, Envoy Extraordinary and Minister Plenipotentiary. Appointed: 1948-03-24. Credentials presented: 1948-06-11. Promoted to Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary 1949-03-23. Note: Commissioned to the Union of South Africa.
